messages.text: We are not able to connect the caddy, I reached out to Erandy Garcilazo Ceja.
There is a hose and adapters for the larger DIN size missing.

Preston Elmer videojet just confirmed that 2 if the units didn't pass pre-ship inspection. The 3rd unit will ship out today and be installed Tuesday and the remaining two will ship out next week and get installed on truffle line next Friday. Can you move the two printers from truffle line to ML4? Chad Stone
Please complete the cleaning of the T3 flow wrapper.
Mid shift- Cleaning progress.
South sweco drains are unclogged

visual inspection pass for; 


Pre heating #1





 


Vibration #4








 


Twisting 








 


Demolding area








 


Group Formation
Still not able to flush the temper unit 1, we are missing a 2nd adapter to connect the hoses to the temper unit. Preston Elmer do you have another one?
Connection Section: Visual Inspection passed
Pre heating #2 visual inspection passed
Cooler filter #4 visual inspection pass
Filling PTL 3 with oil to start with the north side pipe flushing.
adapter for caddy is in L2 Rich Brierley is going to get it.
The team has the adapter for the caddy.
Flush with caddy has started.
On temper unit 1
PTL 3 is has oil now, operator is spraying buffer tank 2 to start with the oil recirculation on the north side.
Sweco’s have been lasered engraved. The Desk for all 4 depositors are complete
Depositor 2: Visual inspection passed.
Cooling Cabinet 4: Visual Inspection passed
ATP passed for cream deposit #3
ATP passed caramel deposit tank #2 and magnetic filter
Visual Inspection passed for cream deposit  tank #3
EOS Cleaning Progress.
ATP Molds 62g

As we are cleaning temper unit 1 with caddy, team is changing the melting grid on the PTL as we are changing to chips. Once this is done we will start melting chocolate, for once temper unit is clean start the push with chocolate. 

On buffer tank 2, team is spraying the interior with oil.
We are having issues with sliding depositor #3 out. Maintenance is here helping us.
We need to turn the power on to ML4. It won't let us go into automatic mode while the power's out. We will remove the locks. This is so we can clean deposit #3
After 3rd wash on temper unit 1, oil stills coming out dirty, probably will need two more flushes

Marcos Montano Rose Smuin Chad Stone
Maintenance couldn’t make depositor 3 to work, so was not removed to clean.
As this is not used for next run, will be let in place, and on Tuesday when all the line is turned back on, they will try again.
Sure, working on it.

Erandy Garcilazo Ceja 
 
Could we phone a friendly maintenance from L2 asking for assistance?
I called Raymond from L2. He is on his way.

Awesome. Please update 
 
Thank you for reaching out
 
☺️
Raymond thinks it's a communication error in the system. For depositor 3. We're going to shut all the doors and reset all the alarms.
We are having issues with sensors on closing doors.
Thank you for the update.
Maintenance working on sensors.
Oil flush on temper unit 1 has being completed, team will start to push with chocolate now from PTL and into buffer tank.

Raymond Fleming  and Efrain Rodriguez  were able to get it going, they had to replace all safety covers and close doors, adjust a door safety on heating cabinet, power cycle from the main disconnect, and clear the faults.

Raymond Fleming 
Efrain Rodriguez 
 
Thank you so much for your help tonight.

Erandy Garcilazo Ceja 
Thank you as well for helping the team.
 
☺️
Kimberly Morales I’m by temper unit 1, we will start pushing chocolate, please meet me with 2 of your operators

Chocolate push from PTL1, chocolate looks clean
Waiting on QA approval to start filling buffer tank
Omw
Chocolate has a good taste, smell and texture. Approved by QA

Also currently doing 1st oil flush on temper unit 2.

Both procedures are being made with 3rd shift operators 
I’m making sure to explain and walk them through the process, then stop it and make them start the procedure by them selves
Can I please get help on gondola Jose Vasquez
Rose Smuin, Chad Stone I have 3 pallets of dirty slates for gondola, can we just wipe them clean and install?
Filling buffer tank 1

We’ll have a few guys washing, drying and taking slates back to install on line. 
We’re also working on depositor #3
wiping down outside of ingredient tank so QA can pass off
completing clean on scraper and plow area to install
discharge belt is almost complete
EE training for operator is inspecting TG3 and 4 belts as well as a quick review for SU/ setup.
Cleaning floors
Chocolate on the buffer tank looked good, we are pushing the pipes now
Cleaning drain #6 #7 #11
Clearing fault on discharge/gondola
Belt on TG3 is damaged
Jose Vasquez, Kavin Ayala
Kimberly Morales can you have maintenance come to look why PTL3 pump is not turning on please
Sending team to lunch
3rd oil flush looking good, I think team will be able to push chocolate after this flush
Temper unit 2, oil flush has being completed
PTL pump still not working, maintenance keeps troubleshooting, but if it not gets resolve by 4am team will not have enough time to push chocolate

Kimberly Morales 
 
Erandy has so much knowledge your operators will learn a lot from her tonight.
 
Take advantage of her training
The chocolate in the buffer tank that pushed the pipes has the same color and flavor, it can already be used
Push is going well
TG5 is missing 2 bolts for the safety guards

Kimberly Morales I’m walking out, temper unit 1 system is pretty much done, only thing left to do is flush the 2 pipes that go into depositor.

PTL3 is working now, team will proceed to melt chocolate and start the push.

Frederick Peairs remember to use nozzle plate for mono depositor on depositor 1, as we will run plain chocolate bars first to dial in the packing area.
The minimum was set to 10%. While the tank percentage was at 0%, even though there was oil in there. After changing it to 0% minimum it started up.
Erandy Garcilazo Ceja we’re spilling oil into the drain
I headed out already, talk to your lead, use trays to catch that oil and put it into the scrap barrels
Kimberly Morales who do we have available all the mold were brought down and placed in the staging area, we can use 1 EE to move most pallets to molding area
Kimberly Morales all the white chocolate is staged too we can use another EE to move all white chocolate to the PTL staging area
Molds and chocolate is being staged.
Kimberly Morales Not sure where these go but they are dirty sitting on the Truffle line. They look like catch pans for ML4
Rose Smuin Chad Stone Rich Brierley Alan Greer Finishing loading the last few slate section on the Gondola, then she will be ready for ATP
Drain #8

Rose Smuin Chad Stone Rich Brierley Alan Greer Kimberly Morales Raoul Lubain Itzel Chavez  Good Morning

All 60g molds from the staging area have been moved to the line.

They belong under gondola

Yes, Gondola passed ATP. Only the catch pans that are being washed are missing

Perfect! Thanks Kim
Chocolate staged
Wipers and scrapers on correctly
Cooling cabinet 3
Rich Brierley On Tuesday we will need a depositor installed in #1 slot,
The team is inside cooling cab 3 re- cleaning  currently
Itzel Chavez Rich Brierley First shift on Tuesday will need to clean the floors around the WDS
We will only re-clean cooler 3.
Your are fine I posted to have 1st shift clean floors on Tuesday and QA knows
Rose Smuin Chad Stone Rich Brierley Alan Greer TG 3&5, Gondola, spirals, packaging area, Demolding, Twisting, all passed ATP belts from demolding to Gondola passed ATP
Rich Brierley First shift needs to finish cooling cab 3, TG 4 failed ATP, and Floors need cleaned, Depositor #1 needs to be installed with the one we use for Feastables.
Preston Elmer Rich Brierley Nelson Cook me and Nelson walked the TG lines and found a few issues we corrected the issues
Can someone post a picture of the board with the hourly scrap?
Yes sorry Chad
Good level of glycol
The Belt C6, Imperial, and metal detector are running correctly.
I verified the SD with my team. The chiller still need to be updated
Level 2 clean in process
Its completed needs to be printed/laminated and placed on the line
all the belts passed visual
Inclusion hopper, auger, depositor have been installed
Everything running correctly
Clean and free of damage

Setup ready for monday  

Cavanna

Bosh

Covering equipment tonight on S2 needs to include

 All of tunnel 3 

C8 from where the curtain on the left turns back towards the window towards the Matrix Machines 

All of the Matrix 6, 7 & 8 area including check weighter, X Ray aabd all belts in the area 

The cavanna 3 & 4 from the last plow belt going towards the cavannas.  And all belts in the area
Are there any clips left after hanging all that plastic?
Nathan Topham
I have not been able to find any clips. Also this is all the plastic I have found in L1.. I don't think it will be enough. We will see
FKL for line 2 will be turned off at 7:00 am, today.
I could only find two and a half rolls of plastic. It's not enough to do all the areas posted. I will do all the areas directly under and closest to the vents
We covered everything we could with the plastic we could find. Prioritizing areas directly beneath and closest to the vents

We did not have enough for all areas so the decision was made to not cover tunnel 3 (since the belt is not exposed. And the boxing belt (because the food product is in a pouch AND a box before touching this belt. But I did put up the shields that we had to try and minimize dust as much as possible
Long weekend checklist
Do you know who can unload them?

I ment to post this earlier, Daniel Bringas we were only able to complete 18 barrels of one shot due to running out of vitamin E for the one shot

I ment to post this earlier, Daniel Bringas we were only able to complete 18 barrels of one shot due to running out of vitamin E for the one shot

It is 8640 lbs
Daniel Bringas correction there are 19 and one partial complete of one shot making it 9320
